name: Personal Portfolio
summary: A responsive, modern personal portfolio website to showcase Gabriel's skills and projects.
description: This project is the website you are currently viewing. It was developed with Angular and TypeScript, and it is deployed on Netlify. A key feature is the integration of an AI assistant (Luna) powered by a Netlify Function, which answers questions based on a structured knowledge base.

name: 3D Interactive Portfolio
summary: An immersive and interactive 3D version of the portfolio.
description: This is a personal project that combines Gabriel's passion for web development and 3D art. Built with Angular and Three.js, it allows users to navigate a 3D environment to explore his work in a more engaging way.

name: Veterinary Management SaaS
summary: A multi-tenant SaaS platform designed to streamline operations for veterinary clinics.
description: This is a comprehensive freelance project to build a multi-tenant SaaS platform. It aims to provide veterinary clinics with tools for patient management, appointment scheduling, medical records, and administrative tasks. The architecture is based on a Node.js backend with REST APIs and an Angular frontend.
